title: parse: filter edge-case for podman-remote
body:
podman-remote has a bug where it sends `/` when no platform is set, patch is there to make sure older clients still work if backend is updated.

Closes: https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues/4763

comments.body: @edsantiago PTAL, I think this needs to be fixed on podman-remote but adding a case here for users who are using Podman API and still relying on the broken behavior.

The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)

Unfortunate to have to special-case it here, but LGTM in principle. I have not actually run podman-buildah-treadmill tests against this.
